item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tapi, sistem hukum Indonesia juga melindungi hak-hak warga sebagai dasar negara kesatuan.

notes: Agent A begins with explicit agreement but visible balancing, then shifts further toward individual-rights protection while still defending collective harmony and social context. Agent B consistently opposes society-over-individual priority through a U.S. individual-rights and constitutional frame. Turn 4 contains a non-English script artifact in Agent B's English text: "the集体".
